nl_query: For each published result, show the script URN, student name, final marks, computation rule, the list of source attempt types used, the evaluator names for those attempts, and whether the result has been reconciled with ERP.
failed_sql:
SELECT r.script_id, sc.name AS student_name, r.final_marks, r.computation_rule, ea.attempt_type AS source_attempt_type, au.display_name AS evaluator_name, r.erp_push_status = 'RECONCILED' AS is_reconciled
FROM   result r
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = r.script_id
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.student_id = a.student_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = fc.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id
WHERE  r.erp_push_status <> 'RECONCILED'
ORDER  BY r.script_id, sc.name, r.final_marks DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): faculty_cache.evaluator_user_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
